title: rondeletia × angustata
intro: Rondeletia × angustata, also known as Narrow-leaved Rondeletia, is a hybrid plant species in the Rubiaceae family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs. The leaves and flowers of Rondeletia × angustata are rich in flavonoids and saponins, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, offering health benefits like reduced congestion and improved lung function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness their medicinal properties.
